strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows, directly aligning with required skills
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) demonstrating initiative and depth
concerns: Lack of explicit experience with Nest.js and Vitest, key required stack components
No clear evidence of recent work with Kotlin, Java, or Python in professional contexts despite listed skills
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially limiting collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: Bogdan brings exceptional full-stack depth, AI-agent experience, and a strong track record in building scalable, test-driven systems — all core to the role. While he lacks direct Nest.js and Vitest exposure, his mastery of equivalent technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, testing frameworks) suggests quick adaptability. The German language barrier is minor given the technical nature of the role and team collaboration norms in Berlin tech. His open-source work and architectural mindset further validate his seniority.
